ogTitle: Rokeby vs Rokewood Junction: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Rokeby and Rokewood Junction.
heading: Rokeby vs Rokewood Junction — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Rokeby, Victoria and Rokewood Junction, Victoria. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Rokewood Junction has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Rokeby (44/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Rokeby or Rokewood Junction safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Rokeby has a flood risk score of 57/100, while Rokewood Junction scores 37/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Rokeby scores 38/100 for bushfire risk. Rokewood Junction scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Rokeby or Rokewood Junction?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Rokewood Junction has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 2.03% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
